'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 135''' was the one hundred thirty-fifth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[July 28]], [[2004]]. It was authored by [[Darren Allanson]], [[Andrew Darling]], [[Chris Gardner]], [[Matthew Harvey]], [[Iain Lowson]] and [[Michael Schiavetta]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}
